productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Bull Rider Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and print on the front Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery With a clean cut and a neat finish that offers a flattering silhouette, this T-shirt from wrangler offers a relaxed, casual vibe. The soft cotton fabric will keep you comfortable so go ahead and pair it with casual trousers, a distressed denim jacket and vans for a stylish look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
